notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Duran to second baseman Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Maikel Garcia out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
